allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Stars:', d['stargazers_count']\); print\('Forks:', d['forks_count']\); print\('Created:', d['created_at']\); print\('Last push:', d['pushed_at']\); print\('Lang:', d['language']\); print\('Archived:', d['archived']\); print\('Topics:', d.get\('topics',[]\)\)")
